name: BernieSanders.com
subject: These super PACs were not supposed to attack us
body:
#
One of the consequences of the Supreme Court's disastrous decision in Citizens United is a flow of unlimited cash to super PACs from millionaires, billionaires, and even corporations.
These super PACs can take in as much money as they want, free from campaign finance limits adhered to by candidates.
We don't have a super PAC, and we don't want one. **The Clinton campaign has several. When this campaign began, those Clinton super PACs were supposed to stay on the sidelines during the primaries._That is no longer the case._**
Clinton super PACs are now spending millions of dollars to fight our movement. I don't think that's right. We should have a fight for the Democratic nomination fair and square. So we're turning to you again to help us even the scales against this super PAC spending.
[**Make a $3 contribution now to help Bernie and our campaign compete against our opponent's super PACs so we can win the Democratic nomination and the White House.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pac-spending?refcode=em160221full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pac-spending?refcode=em160221full")
We are now tied for delegates elected by voters, 51 to 51. But now that millionaires and billionaires' super PACs are heavily involved in this race, we will need to really step up our efforts to talk to voters and help our campaign win.
Thank you for all you've done. Let's keep going.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pac-spending?refcode=em160221full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pac-spending?refcode=em160221full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Ben Carson
subject: Continuing the fight, for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33705694:Wxg3xCCNj:m:1:876315805:7722E426E74DA2F5FFB951A23BB878FC:r)
---

Peter,

I'd like to share with you the words of a South Carolina voter from this past Saturday:

_" I voted for Ben this morning and it was one of the proudest moments in my life. Never in my life have I been so thrilled and emotional to vote. We are honored beyond words to be part of your team."_

While of course we had hoped to finish higher in South Carolina, it's important to remember that only 3 states have now voted. 1,237 delegates are needed to secure the Republican nomination, and currently the national frontrunner has but 67. **There's a long way to go.**

Now that the field has gone from 17 down to 5, there will be more time to focus on solutions and substance rather than personalities, and I look forward to it.

**I will continue to fight on because of the dedication of my supporters. I owe it to the millions of people like you around the country that have put their faith in me.**

The race now moves on to Nevada, which holds its caucuses tomorrow, February 23.**
**
I am campaigning there now, holding town hall meetings and rallies across the state.

**We've had a strong team in Nevada since the beginning of this campaign, and[I ask you to make a donation right now of just $2 or more to support our efforts.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33705694:Wxg3xCCNj:m:1:876315805:7722E426E74DA2F5FFB951A23BB878FC:r)**[ ](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33705695:Wxg3xCCNj:m:1:876315805:7722E426E74DA2F5FFB951A23BB878FC:r)

Whether we can turn this race around depends upon how many supporters like you continue to stand with me. I'm dedicated to fighting this fight until the end. We have a country to save.

Thank you, and God Bless.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

name: Rand Paul
subject: President Obama's worst idea yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Dear Patriot: President Obama and the Democrats have wasted no time in making Justice Scalia's vacancy on the Supreme Court a huge political statement. **They all think this is their big chance to put an end to originalist interpretation of the Constitution.** Obama has made it clear to nominate a replacement -- a liberal replacement -- and liberals in the Senate are shouting that it is the job in the Senate to confirm whoever the President recommends. **This could change the entire path of our country. And not in a good way.** [A liberal majority on the Supreme Court will make sure President Obama's most damaging philosophies survive long past his presidency, and I will be doing all I can to make sure that doesn't happen.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33696080:s9B-7CCNv:m:1:879035888:CA60A530AE10EFBF0E52E7C5061385B7:r) President Obama has done much to damage our country but when I try to sum up the worst thing he's doing, it would have to be that he destroying the separation of powers. **Our founders wanted equal branches of government that would check and balance each oth****er**. Madison put it this way, by having separate equal branches of government we would pit ambition against ambition. The ambition of Congress to accumulate more power would be checked by the ambition of the President to accumulate more power. **The different branches of government would essentially exist in a state of equilibrium.** Unfortunately, President Obama has collapsed the balance of power and grabbed up enormous new powers for the executive branch. **From healthcare to immigration to coal to gun control to war, President Obama has overstepped his boundaries and usurped power. ** My hope is the ultimately the Supreme Court will strike down his overreaching executive orders. **This will not happen if President Obama gets his way and nominates another liberal to the supreme court.** **[I cannot stress this enough: I do not believe Senate should confirm a Supreme Court nomination from President Obama.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33696080:s9B-7CCNv:m:1:879035888:CA60A530AE10EFBF0E52E7C5061385B7:r)
** The fact of the matter is, it's been standard practice over the last nearly 80 years that Supreme Court nominees are not nominated and confirmed during a presidential election year. **Now is not the time to change that.** [Will you stand with me as I do everything I can to block President Obama's attempt to destroy the seperation of powers and silence the opinion of the American public?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33696081:s9B-7CCNv:m:1:879035888:CA60A530AE10EFBF0E52E7C5061385B7:r) The passing of Justice Scalia has made it more clear than ever that the role of the Senate is vital to maintaining liberty. **Without a strong Senate, we cannot ensure that our courts are upholding the Constitution.** That's why I am more committed than ever to serving another term in the Senate for Kentucky and for this country. [Please stand with me today.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33696081:s9B-7CCNv:m:1:879035888:CA60A530AE10EFBF0E52E7C5061385B7:r) In Liberty, Rand Paul | | [GIVE $25 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33696082:s9B-7CCNv:m:1:879035888:CA60A530AE10EFBF0E52E7C5061385B7:r)

Friend,

Without a doubt -- there is only one conservative candidate left in this race who can unite Republicans, beat Donald Trump, and ultimately defeat Hillary Clinton.

I'm the only conservative left...

| ... | who has consistently fought against amnesty and a pathway to citizenship for Illegal immigrants;

---|---
... | who has a record of fighting to overturn Obamacare;

... | who has regularly stood up for traditional marriage and fought to defund Planned Parenthood; AND

... | who you can TRUST to nominate a solid conservative to the Supreme Court.

**Friend, with the stakes so high, we can't settle for anything less than a proven -- TRUSTED -- conservative.**

Here's the situation: _I'm the only candidate in this race who HAS beaten Donald Trump, and I need your help to do it again before it's too late._

**[CHIP IN: Nevada Victory Fund >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33709781:W3ocgCCUN:m:1:1104269936:16FA2105ACAE0FD3425DA9B59CCE4AEA:r)**

**It's down to a three man race** \-- **Donald Trump,** the media favorite who is not a conservative; **Marco Rubio,** the clear choice of the Washington Establishment; **and me,** the only consistent conservative who can unite Republicans and beat Hillary Clinton in the fall.

You see: the liberal media and the Washington Establishment are going all in to defeat me and the conservative values that you and I stand for...but they weren't counting on us to win Iowa.

**Not only did we win in Iowa, but we won by a wide margin, defeating Donald Trump, the Washington Establishment, and the crony ethanol lobbyists.**

Then again in New Hampshire -- the media said a conservative couldn't be competitive, but we were.

Finally, they threw everything they had at us in South Carolina, but we still finished in a dead heat for 2nd place.

**Friend, we've finished in the top three in every state so far --** with your help, we have proven the Washington Establishment wrong.

But with the Nevada Caucuses less than 24 hours away -- **[I MUST have your support again.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33709781:W3ocgCCUN:m:1:1104269936:16FA2105ACAE0FD3425DA9B59CCE4AEA:r)**

I won't give up on you, and I will not give up on our country.

**[CHIP IN: Nevada Victory Fund >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33709781:W3ocgCCUN:m:1:1104269936:16FA2105ACAE0FD3425DA9B59CCE4AEA:r)**

If I can't count on you, one of my closest supporters, then I could be in serious trouble...

We don't have to settle for a candidate endorsed by the media -- Donald Trump.

And we don't have to settle for a candidate endorsed by the Washington Establishment -- Marco Rubio.

We have come so far. [**Will you stand with me now?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33709781:W3ocgCCUN:m:1:1104269936:16FA2105ACAE0FD3425DA9B59CCE4AEA:r)

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

subject: Update: What's a heaven for?
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17197b0/3476a20e/c57cfc9/27450e6d/3561947291/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, We are just over $800 away from reaching the $12,433 "dollar per signature" goal below. If you haven't yet, please chip in what you can -- [we only need about $8 from 100 people, $16 from 50 people, or $32 from 25 people!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17197b0/3476a20e/c57cfc9/27450e6c/3561947291/VEsE/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0222FBp1&amounts=8,16,32")
| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17197b0/3476a20e/c57cfc9/27450e6b/3561947291/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0222FBb1&amounts=8,16,32")
---

* * *
Peter,
I've always been fond of the saying: "your reach should exceed your grasp, or what's a heaven for?"
Over the past three weeks, our grassroots navy was asked to obtain the required 2,000 signatures to place my name on the ballot for Senate.
_Your reach exceeded that grasp_ , **and yesterday we filed 12,433 signatures from 55 counties****across****Pennsylvania!** Thank you, so very much, to everybody who helped us reach _six times_ beyond our grasp!
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17197b0/3476a20e/c57cfc9/27450e6a/3561947291/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0222FBb2&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
**With our ground war unmatched, I now need your help getting on the airwaves. **[That's why I'm setting another big reach: $12,433 - that's $1 for each signature we collected - by week's end. Please contribute today toward our grasp!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17197b0/3476a20e/c57cfc9/27450e69/3561947291/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0222FBp2&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
**I'd ask each of you to pick a county from below and match its signature number to a dollar amount.** Take Adams County and contribute $214 or 21.40; or Armstrong County and contribute $70 or $7.
$12,433 is a big number, but "your reach should exceed your grasp, or what's a heaven for!"

subject: Amnesty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jonathan McConnell
body:
| Friend -- NumbersUSA, a conservative immigration policy group with more than 4 million participants across the country, has named me a "True Reformer" in the fight against Amnesty. Richard Shelby is spending millions of dollars from pro-Amnesty Special Interests to fool conservatives by making numerous, false accusations about my rock-solid position against Amnesty. But, immigration policy organizations, like NumbersUSA, have the research and resources available online to highlight the truth. Let me be clear as a bell: Under NO circumstances have I ever, nor will I ever, support Amnesty. name: Team Sestak
subject: You're Invited: Foreign Policy Tour
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17197ca/3476a20e/c54169a/27450ddf/1016128118/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, Tomorrow I'm kicking off a 7-stop 2-day foreign policy tour of the state to release my _[Plan for Securing America in the 21st Century](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17197ca/3476a20e/c54169a/27450dde/1016128118/VEsE/ "http://joesestak.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2016/02/ns-plan-final.pdf")_ , a foreign policy document that charts a course for American national security in the modern day -- a follow on to my domestic issues tour. **_Please find below my schedule, and if you are in the area and able to make it to any of these events, I would love to see you there!_**
**_Tuesday, February 23rd Events Details_** **Stop 1: Lancaster - U.S. Global Leadership in the 21st Century**
**DATE:** Tuesday, February 23, 2016
**WHEN:** 9:00AM EST to 10:00AM EST
**WHERE:** Lancaster County Democratic Committee Headquarters
53 North Duke Street, Suite 10
Lancaster, PA 17602
**WHAT:** U.S. global leadership and a U.S. Strategy of Engagement to secure the peace and prosperity of America in view of the national security challenges of our day and of the future.

**Stop 2: Philadelphia - Our World Today and the Meaning of America's Engagement
DATE:** Tuesday, February 23, 2016
**WHEN:** 12:00PM EST to 1:00PM EST
**WHERE:** Room G01, Irvine Auditorium, corner Spruce Street and South 34th Street
University of Pennsylvania
Philadelphia, PA 19104
**WHAT:** Security challenges today and tomorrow range from geographic to asymmetrical and transnational - from regional crises/conflicts to global disruptions such as those that arise from climate change - forcing us to confront these challenges in new ways than in the past.

**Stop 3: Allentown - A Smart National Security Strategy for Today
DATE:** Tuesday, February 23, 2016
**WHEN:** 2:30PM EST to 3:30PM EST
**WHERE:** Seegers Union Room 110
Muhlenberg College
Allentown, PA 18104
**WHAT:** A new national security strategy must not only include a new defense strategy and force posture, but must also be multi-faceted, with the power of our diplomacy and economic partnerships at its vanguard to best secure our peace and prosperity.

**Stop 4: Wilkes-Barre - The Challenge and Opportunity of Our Time: The Asia Pacific
DATE:** Tuesday, February 23, 2016
**WHEN:** 5:00PM EST to 6:00PM EST
**WHERE:** The Main Bean cafe
161 Main Street
Luzerne, PA 18709
**WHAT:** While the global war on terror remains the primary tactical threat to U.S. interests, the Asia Pacific regions -- particularly the Western Pacific -- must be the center of our strategic gravity in the 21st century, economically, diplomatically, and in terms of allied defense security, requiring a realignment of our focus on securing our interests in that region. _**Wednesday, February 24th Events Details**_ **Stop 5: Erie - Fight for America in a Competitive World
DATE:** Wednesday, February 24, 2016
**WHEN:** 8:30AM EST to 9:30AM EST
**WHERE:** Dining room, Bayfront Grille, Sheraton Erie Bayfront Hotel
55 West Bay Drive
Erie, PA 16507
**WHAT:** Our national security strategy is historically grounded on a strong, growing economy - the bottom line of being able to afford our nation's overall security. Globalization and other worldwide challenges must be properly addressed in terms of securing our economic interest, which is inextricably intertwined with the other elements of our power.

**Stop 6: Pittsburgh - Preparing for the Consequences of Climate Change
DATE:** Wednesday, February 24, 2016
**WHEN:** 12:00PM EST to 1:00PM EST
**WHERE:** >University of Pittsburgh School of Law, Room 111
3900 Forbes Ave,
Pittsburgh, PA 15260
**WHAT:** The Defense Department has cited climate change as an "urgent and growing threat" to our nation's security in the future because of significant global instability brought about by droughts and food insecurity as well as the melting of the Arctic. We must prepare to address this threat, especially as it has to do with not only our security but the life of the planet.

**Stop 7: Altoona - History's Calling**
**DATE:** Wednesday, February 24, 2016
**WHEN:** 3:30PM EST to 4:30PM EST
**WHERE:** Lena's Cafe
2000 8th Avenue
Altoona, PA 16602
**WHAT:** America's leadership in preserving the American Dream is based upon more than winning wars, for it requires securing the peace, and the United States must now do so -- as it has before in its history -- with a new national security strategy that has adapted to the constantly evolving threats and challenges confronting our Dream. At each location, Joe will speak to supporters and members of the media about the topic of each event. He will also take questions from the media, and copies of the plan will be available at each event.
---

P.O. Box 1936
Media, PA 19063

body:
| Dear Friend,

Did you see the _Baltimore Sun_ headline last week, "Conservative group to challenge Chris Van Hollen on campaign finance"?

A Koch Brothers-funded group is going after Chris because he has been going after them.

We hear a lot of easy talk from candidates about how they want to fight Citizens United, but talk is cheap.

You know you are doing something right when the Koch Brothers target you.

**[Will you stand with Chris as he wages this battle AGAINST the Koch Brothers and everything they represent?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91cf8/70cdc2ba/47c2279f/396aaf3/2268126331/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stop-the-koch-brothers-?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+stand+with+Chris+as+he+wages+th&utm_campaign=em022216&source=em022216")**

This is no time for empty slogans, its a time for action -- and that is what Chris is all about.

**[Add your name and show the Koch Brothers you understand the difference.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91cf8/70cdc2ba/47c2279f/396aaf0/2268126331/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stop-the-koch-brothers-?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+and+show+the+Koch+Brothers&utm_campaign=em022216&source=em022216")**

Sheila O'Connell
Campaign Manager
